name: Shadowbroker
desc: Open-source intelligence for the global theater. Track everything from the corporate/private jets of the wealthy, and spy satellites, to seismic events in one unified interface. Hook an AI agent up to have it parse through data and find previously unseen correlations. The knowledge is available to all but rarely aggregated in the open, until now.

name: openagents
desc: OpenAgents - AI Agent Networks for Open Collaboration

name: openagentskill
desc: Open discovery, audit, and recommendation infrastructure for AI agent skills.

name: learn-skills.dev
desc: Curated high-quality AI Agent Skills. Search, install, copy and share. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, OpenClaw, and other AI coding tools.

name: eCommerce-Skills
desc: E-commerce skills for AI agents — product research, marketing automation, supply chain optimization, and business analytics for online sellers across Amazon, Shopify, Etsy, TikTok Shop, and all platforms.

name: sim
desc: Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents. Sim is the central intelligence layer for your AI workforce.

name: lobu
desc: Autonomous agents in your organization. Multi-tenant OpenClaw

name: osaurus
desc: Own your AI. The native macOS harness for AI agents -- any model, persistent memory, autonomous execution, cryptographic identity. Built in Swift. Fully offline. Open source.

name: cli
desc: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 20+ AI Agent Skills.

name: composio
desc: Composio powers 1000+ toolkits, tool search, context management, authentication, and a sandboxed workbench to help you build AI agents that turn intent into action.
